name: colab
description: Drive Google Colab from Claude Code over a bundled MCP server — open Drive notebooks, run code in the kernel, manage multiple sessions, upload/download VM files, mount Drive, read Colab secrets, inspect variables, edit notebook cells, and run fine-tune round-trip + local MLX conversion helpers. Optional headless/Playwright backend. Includes guided /colab:setup and /colab:help commands.

author.name: Ryan Robson and Robworks Software LLC
